commit.message:
index.html에 FR/IT 언어 버튼 추가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix session recovery: handle desync, unknown sessions, rate-limited rotation

- decrypt_traffic now returns DecryptResult enum (Ok/SendInit/Drop)
  instead of Option<Vec<u8>>, enabling callers to trigger recovery
- Unknown session traffic: send throwaway init (random keys, no buffer)
  matching Go's _handleTraffic else branch
- Decryption failure / invalid key seqs: send recovery init with
  existing session keys (matches Go sessionInfo._sendInit)
- Add rate-limited key rotation (once per minute) with rotated: Option<Instant>
  matching Go's rotated field and time.Since check
- Always update next_send/recv_nonce before rotation check (anti-replay)
- Fix nonce overflow in encrypt_traffic: also reset next_*_nonce
- Add make_recovery_init() and make_throwaway_init() to SessionManager
- Add SessionAction enum: Plaintext/RecoveryInit/ThrowawayInit/Nothing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix auth callback: consistent /api/ path, handle both PKCE and implicit flow

All callback URLs now consistently use /partners/api/auth/callback.
The route.ts handles both auth flows in a single endpoint:
- PKCE (?code= param): server-side exchangeCodeForSession
- Implicit (#access_token hash): returns HTML page with inline JS
  that reads the hash fragment, calls setSession, and redirects

Removed stray /partners/auth/callback page and middleware entry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove restrictive typeRoots so monorepo-hoisted @types are found

DigitalOcean build failed because typeRoots restricted TypeScript to
only ./node_modules/@types, missing hoisted @types/compression at the
workspace root.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: resolve client codes to names in AI suggestion cards

AI engines return numeric client codes (e.g. "51001801") in clienteNome
field instead of actual names. The rendering code used clienteNome
directly via || operator, bypassing _resolveClienteName().

Fix:
- Skip clienteNome if it looks like a numeric code (5+ digits) or CLI_ prefix
- Post-process all suggestions when received from SSE: resolve codes in
  clienteNome, title, and description fields
- Also resolve 8+ digit codes inline in description text to "Name (code)"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  border-bottom: border-strong on thead, 32px horizontal page padding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix payment sparkline window to show historical data (#54)

When all payments predate the rolling 6-month window (e.g. after a
historical CSV import), the sparkline was always empty. The window now
anchors to the most recent payment month so historical data is always
visible. Adds paymentSparklineByUser tests covering this case.

Closes #43

Co-authored-by: Heiko Rademacher <rademacher.heiko@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

add unit tests, snapshot tests, and CI pipeline

Adds testing infrastructure using Bun's built-in test runner: app registry
unit tests, config parsing tests, compose/caddy generation snapshot tests,
and a GitHub Actions CI workflow running typecheck, build, and tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v11.3.2: Auto-correct corrupted peakValue on startup

If peakValue is >2x current portfolio value on startup, it was almost certainly
inflated by a false deposit detection. Reset it to current portfolio value to
prevent permanent CAPITAL FLOOR lockout. Also removes the false deposit entry
from history if it was added within the last 24 hours and exceeds $1000.

This ensures the bot self-heals after the v11.3.1 false deposit bug without
needing manual admin intervention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(audit): add Symphony integration foundation types and detection

Add framework detection, workflow config scanning, and orchestration
readiness fields to AuditRuntimeContext. Bump max_score to 22 to
reflect the new agent_workflow orchestration point. Add two new
detection helpers (checkWorkflowConfigForPattern,
checkWorkflowsForMergeProtection) for scanning workflow configs
and CI pipelines.

and recalibrates maturity thresholds across scoring and evolve to account
for the expanded 22-point scale.

paths. Adjust resolveCurrentLevelKey boundaries to match new maturity
calibration (L1<=11, L2<=16, L3<=19).

Add symphony-integration.md design decision document.

commit.message:
fix(logo): separar Three.js en chunk independiente para eliminar WebGL loop en demo

Extrae todo el código Three.js/@react-three a ThreeCoinLogo.tsx.
SpinningCoinLogo.tsx ya no importa drei/fiber/three directamente.
En build demo (NEXT_PUBLIC_DEMO_MODE=true), el import dinámico de
ThreeCoinLogo queda como dead code y webpack lo elimina del bundle,
evitando el bucle WebGL context loss por el HDR de Environment.
Desktop y web usan next/dynamic para cargar el chunk lazy.

commit.message:
fix: set CSP header after nonce generation and allow cross-origin resource loading

Helmet sets headers eagerly before cspNonce middleware runs, resulting in
nonce-undefined in the CSP header. Moved to a custom CSP middleware that
runs after nonce generation. Also set cross-origin resource policy on the
content app so the shell can load remoteEntry.js across origins.

commit.message:
Add lore book: A Letter Never Sent

A 4-page love letter from a twilight folk writer fading between worlds.
Their city is disappearing — buildings flicker between stone and starlight,
hands pass through cups, voices don't carry. Written to a lover who will
never read it, by someone who stands beside them every day unseen. Hints
at the Spirit Membrane thickening as collateral damage of a larger design.

Also fixes landmark test count (6 -> 8) after upstream additions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: remove stale closure in 401 session expired handler

The onSessionExpired callback captured the initial value of sessionExpired
(always false) making the guard condition `if (!sessionExpired)` misleading.
Simplified to just call setSessionExpired(true) which is idempotent.

commit.message:
fix: Symphonie Pro silent playback and missing instrument samples

Root cause: SymphonieEngine.play() was never called during playback.
The engine loaded the song via InstrumentFactory but startNativeEngines()
had no Symphonie entry, so the worklet sequencer never started.

Fixes:
- Add Symphonie to startNativeEngines() with suppressNotes + play()
- Populate each instrument with decoded PCM sample data (Float32Array → WAV)
  so instruments display properly with waveforms in the instrument list
- Fix cell-edit re-export using new AudioContext() instead of shared context
- Make MCP WS relay non-fatal when port 4003 is busy

Add musicdir command for random music playlist from WAV directory

Scans a directory for .wav files and plays them in random order,
auto-advancing to the next track when each one ends. No repeats
until the current track finishes.

Usage: musicdir music/fight (start), musicdir (stop)

commit.message:
fix: use app.outdir for default bib path and O(1) key deduplication (#56)

* fix: use app.outdir for default bib path and O(1) key deduplication (LOW)

- Default output_file now resolves to <outdir>/_temp/_generated_figures.bib
  instead of the hardcoded _build/_temp/ path, so custom build directory
  configurations and builds with a non-default outdir work correctly
- Replace the per-iteration bib_content string concatenation (O(n²)) with
  a generated_keys set for O(1) duplicate detection in the generation loop

https://claude.ai/code/session_01GimdTNrSKRnZediCQoCkPM

* Clarify output_file path with <app.outdir> placeholder

Update README sphinx configuration to use the <app.outdir> placeholder for the bib `output_file` and add a comment noting the placeholder will be replaced with the actual output directory during the build. This clarifies where the generated figures bibliography will be written.

fix(content): add missing medical/airlock location names to rescue skeleton (Issue #76)

The rescue skeleton's nodeLocations referenced roles 'medical' (unlock/reveal
nodes) and 'airlock' (boss node) that were absent from theme.supportedRoles
and theme.locationNames, causing resolveLocationName() to fall back to
"Zone inconnue (role)" for those core nodes.

- Add 'medical' and 'airlock' to rescue skeleton supportedRoles
- Add 22 alien-ruins-themed French names for each role in locationNames
- Add two regression tests (GH-76) to regressions.test.ts
- Fix incorrect getSettingById() call in reproduction code templates
  (apps-script-feedback.gs, feedback.ts, ISSUE_RESOLUTION_METHODOLOGY.md)
